---
title: "Explore"
subtitle: "Interactive mathematics for conjecturing with your hands."
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

::: {.content-block .mn-page-lead}
An interactive is not an illustration after the mathematics. It is a place where the mathematics can begin: move something, watch a constraint, and ask what remains possible.
:::

::: {.mn-lab-card .content-block}
::: {.mn-lab-visual}
![A four by four arrangement of binary kolam tiles.](../assets/kolam-field.svg)
:::

::: {.mn-lab-copy}
<p class="mn-kicker">LIVE LAB · TILINGS AND INVARIANTS</p>

## The Kolam Tile Laboratory

Build a closed connected kolam from sixteen binary tiles, investigate legal moves in a 15-puzzle, and try to navigate between configurations in the same orbit.

::: {.mn-chip-row}
<span>Tile matching</span><span>Connectivity</span><span>Parity</span><span>Algorithms</span>
:::

[Open the interactive](https://kolam-tile-builder.littleboy300.chatgpt.site){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg}
[Read the companion note](../read/articles/binary-kolam-tiles/index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-dark .btn-lg}
:::
:::

::: {.content-block}
## A rhythm for exploration

::: {.mn-three-up}
::: {.mn-path-card}
### Play

Begin without instructions beyond the goal. Let the constraints become visible through failed and successful moves.
:::

::: {.mn-path-card}
### Understand

Name the patterns you notice, translate them into mathematical statements, and decide what would count as evidence.
:::

::: {.mn-path-card}
### Teach

Use the same object as a classroom investigation, with prompts that preserve room for student decisions.
:::
:::
:::

::: {.content-block .mn-coming-soon}
## More journeys are being prepared

Future laboratories will grow from geometry, algebra, number theory and mathematical games. Math Nomad will favour a small collection of carefully developed interactives over a long catalogue of disconnected demonstrations.
:::
